title: datura wallichii
intro: Datura wallichii, also known as the Indian poison or devil's trumpet, is a species of poisonous plant in the nightshade family. The plant's medicinal properties include its use in traditional medicine for treating various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Datura wallichii include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and muscle pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its toxic compounds must be carefully extracted and dosed to avoid adverse effects.
